mapper.select: SELECT A.USER_ID AS id , A.USER_NM AS userNm , A.EML AS eml , A.MTELNO AS mtelno , A.GNDR_SE AS gndrSe , A.TELNO AS telno , A.ADDR AS addr , A.DADDR AS daddr , A.CI AS ci , A.DI AS di , 'ROLE_ADMIN' AS userSe FROM CMS_USER_ADMIN A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT PWD FROM CMS_PWD WHERE USER_ID = #{UserId} AND USER_SE = 'A' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT TK_ID AS tkId , USER_ID AS userId , TK AS tk , TK_EXP_DT AS tkExpDt , RVK_YN AS rkvYn , IP_ADDR AS ipAddr , USER_AGT AS userAgt FROM CMS_RF_TK WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND RVK_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CMS_RF_TK ( TK_ID , USER_ID , TK , TK_EXP_DT , RVK_YN , CRT_AT , CRT_BY , CRT_IP , CRT_PGM , UPD_AT , UPD_BY , UPD_IP , UPD_PGM ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(TK_ID), 0) + 1 FROM CMS_RF_TK) , #{userId} , #{tk} , #{tkExpDt} , #{rkvYn} , SYSDATE , #{userId} , 'SYSTEM' , 'AdminAuthService' , SYSDATE , #{userId} , 'SYSTEM' , 'AdminAuthService' )
